name: Outpost Captain
description: Leads the faction during missions, keeps decision-making organized, makes sure every member is involved, and represents the faction during briefings.

name: Scout / Radio Operator
description: Handles navigation, maps, trails, clues, A.R.K. messages, mission envelopes, and communication with leaders.

name: Engineer
description: Leads pioneering, knots, lashings, shelter building, repairs, barricades, structures, and technical outdoor tasks.

name: Medic / Peacekeeper
description: Watches hydration, fatigue, first aid awareness, emotional balance, teamwork, conflict, inclusion, and respect.

name: Quartermaster / Archivist
description: Controls supplies, tools, ration cards, equipment return, collected clues, written notes, and the faction's final report.
